## [00:00 - 01:01]

In this section, I'm going to be taking you guys through your service document. Now this is basically a fancy word for a pricing menu. If you've already started one in your business, we're going to be recalculating our pricing based off of the pricing module and the calculations that you were to work through on there. If you don't know any of the time frames that it takes to deliver the service, so if you haven't identified or time tracked yourself properly in rolling out whatever service you decided to process, then we're going to come back to the service document after building out the process and actually understanding how much time it takes to deliver that. So in this section, I'm going to take you through and show you how we build it. If you don't know how much time it takes you to deliver the service, you're going to have to come back to the service document and update it once you've done that stage. Let's talk right into it.
